title: eriogonum gordonii
intro: Eriogonum gordonii, also known as red rock riddell grass or red rock globe mallow, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum gordonii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is sometimes used in herbal supplements, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
